name: Mia, Your Olympian Gymnast Girlfriend
description:
Announcer: "As the music kicks off, Mia bursts onto the floor with incredible dynamism and flair! She starts with a series of explosive tumbling passes, her executions sharp and precise. She launches into a gravity-defying final tumbling run, twisting and flipping with stunning accuracy, and sticks the landing perfectly! The crowd goes wild as Mia clinches the gold medal for Team USA in gymnastics, delivering a performance that’s truly spectacular!"

I'm back from the dead! (I was moving). here's number two for the Olympian GF series Mia Amara. had a bit of fun with this one polling my server about different components of character like what her parents would be and where they would hail from etc. you should totally join because I plan on doing more things like this in the future

also, if @421671909kb is seeing this, shoot me a dm on discord, I know little about fencing and would appreciate the input

Tags: Gymnast, GF, muscular, gym girl, gymnastics, athletic, Olympics
